home.subtitle: An objective, professional, and cutting-edge evaluating platform for AI videos, presenting you with top-tier anime and short dramas.

about.title: Discover Infinite Possibilities in AI Narrative
about.subtitle: We are dedicated to building a consensus on AI video content evaluation, letting outstanding creators be seen.
about.missionText: In an era flooded with massive low-quality content, our mission is to use a professional, objective review system to filter out truly worthy AI film and television works from the noise — safeguarding audiences' time and experience, while ensuring that every dedicated director and producer is seen and respected.
about.visionText: To become the world's authoritative quality standard-setter for AI film and television content, making the "SceneScore Rating" a trusted content filter for audiences, and driving the AI creative ecosystem toward higher quality and greater value.
about.companyP1: Scene Score AI is a data technology enterprise focusing on AI and the pan-entertainment content ecosystem. We aim to build the world's first authoritative rankings and comprehensive data analysis system for the niche tracks of "AI Shorts" and "AI Anime".
about.companyP2: As AIGC technology disrupts film and television production, short dramas and anime are experiencing explosive growth. Utilizing our proprietary "SceneScore® Multi-modal Data Engine", we track tens of thousands of AI-assisted or fully AI-generated works across the internet in real time. Beyond data collection, we integrate professional review mechanisms from the film industry, rating highly popular works quarterly to ensure top-notch quality.
about.companyP3: We provide multi-dimensional rankings based on views, retention, paid conversions, and AI content proportions. Moreover, we offer market insights, hit prediction models, and copyright value assessments for the industry.
about.companyP4: Acting as a bridge connecting technology, content, and commerce, Scene Score AI strives to guide creators, help platforms discover great content, and aid investors in seeing the true value of the AI content track.
about.core1Desc: Updated quarterly, including popularity, commercial value, and potential newcomer leaderboards to provide market benchmarks.
about.core2Desc: Providing precise competitor monitoring, user behavior profiling, and market trend forecasting for film companies and MCNs.
about.core3Desc: Applying leading "Evaluating AI with AI" technologies to quantitatively rate script structures, visual precision, and production quality.
about.feature1Desc: Establishing independent rankings and evaluation systems for "AI Shorts" and "AI Anime" to avoid conflation with traditional media.
about.feature2Desc: We measure "AI Content Volume" beyond traffic. Our exclusive rating system highlights the depth of AI application (script, text-to-video, AI dubbing) and quantifies it with Scene Score to define "purity" and "depth".
about.feature3Desc: Through paid clicks and completion rates, our published "Commercial Potential Ranking" serves as a crucial reference for investors.
about.mission: Making excellent AI content visible, turning data into productivity — This is the mission of Scene Score AI.

judges.title: Distinguished Jury
judges.subtitle: We are honored to have esteemed veterans from the Chinese-language entertainment industry serve as SceneScore quarterly judges, bringing professional expertise to set quality standards for AI film and television content.
judges.judge1WorksList: SPL: Kill Zone series, Paradox, My Lucky Star
judges.judge1P1: Paco Wong's influence in Hong Kong's entertainment industry spans from the music industry to film investment, with particularly significant contributions to cinema. As the former head of Sun Entertainment Culture, he turned his star-making talent toward the big screen, leading investments in hard-hitting action films such as the SPL: Kill Zone series and Paradox, successfully balancing commercial box office success with critical acclaim.
judges.judge1P2: Not only a film producer, but also the behind-the-scenes mentor of action stars, he propelled talent like Wu Jing and Max Zhang to the peak of their careers, injecting new vitality into Hong Kong action cinema. From his early work on My Lucky Star to later genre films, Paco Wong leveraged his sharp market instincts to become a key bridge between Hong Kong local productions and the Chinese-language film market.
judges.judge2Title: Lead Guitarist of Legendary HK Band "The Wynners"
judges.judge2WorksList: Second Class Citizens, The Brave Five
judges.judge2P1: Bennett Pang's artistic achievements extend from the music stage to the silver screen, making him one of the most iconic comedic faces of Hong Kong cinema's golden era. His film career is closely intertwined with the growth of The Wynners, where he portrayed approachable, wholesome, and humorous characters that embodied the band's optimistic, can-do spirit.
judges.judge2P2: Known for capturing the vitality of ordinary people on screen, his acclaimed 1981 role in Second Class Citizens vividly portrayed the helplessness and self-deprecating humor of grassroots citizens, resonating widely with audiences. In addition to his on-screen work, Bennett contributed his musical talents to film scores and songs, blending rock elements with cinematic sensibilities.

rules.title: Ranking Rules
rules.cond1: Contains more than 50% AI-generated visuals (Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, Runway, Pika, etc.).
rules.cond2: Clear storyline with coherent characters and logic.
rules.cond3: Published on public streaming or social platforms (Bilibili, Douyin, Honguo, YouTube, TikTok, Drama Wave, etc.).
rules.cond4: No vulgarity, infringement, or severe violations.
rules.scoreDesc: The final score is a weighted average of four dimensions:
rules.s1Desc: Visual coherence, character consistency, lighting aesthetics, and audio matching.
rules.s2Desc: Pacing, suspense, logical consistency, and dialogue quality.
rules.s3Desc: Total views, specific engagement rates, and positive feedback ratio.
rules.s4Desc: Utilization of new AI workflows or overcoming conventional generation limits.
rules.freq1: AI Anime: Updated quarterly, presenting the best AI anime works of the quarter.
rules.freq2: AI Shorts: Updated quarterly, showcasing the most impactful AI shorts of the quarter.

ranking.animeDesc: Curated by our professional jury, combining audio-visual quality, narrative, and audience response to present the best AI anime of this quarter.
ranking.shortDesc: Curated by our professional jury, focusing on fast-paced impact and visual shocks, presenting the most influential AI-generated shorts of this quarter.
ranking.musicDesc: Showcasing the most innovative and artistically valuable AI-generated music this quarter, spanning Chinese traditional, electronic, R&B, and more.
ranking.toolsDesc: Evaluating the most powerful AI creative tools available today — from video generation to audio synthesis — offering creators authoritative recommendations.
ranking.comingSoon: Detail page coming soon, stay tuned!
